meals.name: The Powerhouse
meals.description: Marinated grilled chicken breast over fluffy basmati rice, finished with charred tenderstem broccoli and roasted peppers. Smoky, lean and built to fuel a heavy training session.
meals.ingredients: Chicken breast, basmati rice, tenderstem broccoli, red peppers, olive oil, piri piri spice blend (paprika, garlic, chilli, lemon), sea salt, black pepper.
meals.heat_instructions: Microwave on full power for 90 seconds. Stir, leave to rest 30 seconds, serve. Oven: 180°C for 12 minutes covered.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 4 days of collection. Suitable for home freezing.

meals.name: Beef & Sweet Spud
meals.description: Tender braised beef chuck steak with roasted sweet potato wedges, massaged kale and a rich beefy jus. Perfect for bulking season or weekend energy.
meals.ingredients: Beef chuck steak, sweet potato, kale, beef stock, red onion, garlic, thyme, rosemary, olive oil, sea salt, black pepper.
meals.heat_instructions: Microwave on full power for 2 minutes. Stir well. Oven: 160°C for 15 minutes covered.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 3 days of collection. Suitable for home freezing.

meals.name: Honey Glazed Salmon
meals.description: Pan-seared salmon fillet with a light honey and soy glaze, served on fluffy jasmine rice with a crisp edamame and sesame slaw. Omega-3 packed and restaurant quality.
meals.ingredients: Salmon fillet, jasmine rice, edamame, cucumber, sesame seeds, rice vinegar, soy sauce, honey, ginger, garlic, sesame oil, sea salt.
meals.heat_instructions: Microwave on full power for 90 seconds. Stir gently. Oven: 160°C for 10 minutes covered.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 2 days of collection. Not suitable for freezing.

meals.name: Halloumi & Couscous
meals.tagline: Griddled halloumi, lemon couscous, med veg
meals.description: Squeaky-fresh halloumi cheese griddled until golden, with fluffy lemon couscous and a medley of roasted Mediterranean vegetables. Vegetarian crowd-pleaser.
meals.ingredients: Halloumi cheese, couscous, zucchini, eggplant, red pepper, red onion, cherry tomato, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, sea salt, black pepper.
meals.heat_instructions: Microwave on full power for 75 seconds. Stir. Oven: 180°C for 10 minutes covered.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 4 days of collection. Suitable for home freezing.

meals.name: Tikka Chicken Bowl
meals.description: Spiced tandoori chicken thighs with cauliflower rice, cooling natural yogurt raita and toasted cumin seeds. Low-carb, high-protein, and deeply aromatic.
meals.ingredients: Chicken thighs, cauliflower, Greek yogurt, ginger, garlic, tandoori spice blend, lemon juice, coriander, cumin seeds, sea salt, black pepper.
meals.heat_instructions: Microwave on full power for 90 seconds. Stir well. Oven: 180°C for 12 minutes covered.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 4 days of collection. Suitable for home freezing.

meals.name: Banana Protein Oats
meals.tagline: Overnight oats, whey, banana, almond butter
meals.description: Creamy overnight oats blended with whey protein powder, topped with sliced banana, almond butter, granola crunch and a drizzle of honey. Grab-and-go breakfast fuel.
meals.ingredients: Rolled oats, whole milk, whey protein powder (vanilla), banana, natural almond butter, honey, granola (oats, honey, coconut oil), sea salt.
meals.heat_instructions: Enjoy cold straight from the fridge, or warm gently in microwave for 60 seconds if preferred.
meals.storage: Keep refrigerated below 5°C. Best within 2 days of collection. Not suitable for home freezing.
